allow: Bash(node -e "const l = require\('lucide-react'\); const keys = Object.keys\(l\).filter\(k => /git|linked|twitter|x$/i.test\(k\)\); console.log\(keys\)")

Bash(node -e "const l = require\('lucide-react'\); const keys = Object.keys\(l\).filter\(k => /^\(Linked|Linked2|Github|GithubIcon|Twitter|X$|XIcon|Linkedin\)/i.test\(k\) && !k.startsWith\('Lucide'\)\); console.log\(keys.join\('\\n'\)\)")
